name: Ruby (via ruby-build)
description: Installs Ruby using ruby-build, with optional rbenv or rvm for version management.

version.description: Select or enter a Ruby version to install

versionManager.description: Version manager to install alongside Ruby: 'rbenv', 'rvm', or 'none' (ruby-build only)

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container installs Ruby via ruby-build. rbenv or rvm may also be available depending on the versionManager option. The default Ruby is on the PATH via /usr/local/rubies/current/bin (or rbenv shims if rbenv is the version manager).
